purpose: Ingestion-ready package for importing O*NET and ESCO into TALLENTIN vocabulary data model.
run_order: python scripts/merge_vocab.py --seed data/vocab_terms.json --onet generated/onet_normalized.json --esco generated/esco_normalized.json --output generated/tallentin_vocab_merged.json
legal_position: Use O*NET and ESCO as open taxonomy backbone with attribution. Use LinkedIn/Indeed/Glassdoor/ZipRecruiter/ATS pages only as market-signal references unless licensed or permissioned.
completed_actions: Downloaded O*NET text files individually from official O*NET Resource Center paths
Merged O*NET normalized data into TALLENTIN seed
Rebuilt data.js for the finder UI
esco_status: Not bulk-downloaded in this run because ESCO download workflow redirects to privacy statement and email delivery. ESCO parser and API/download instructions remain in package.
